name: ba
description: Business Analyst Agent for Techjays Delivery OS. Processes discovery artifacts, classifies sources safely, maintains a living scope document and supporting registers, and prepares shared context for downstream Doc and TL agents. Also reviews the scope document like a paranoid BA — breaking it down feature by feature, scoring each on coverage depth across the nine D&D dimensions, interrogating under-specified points into concrete questions, and validating against the client's shared examples — then closes the questions through a response/adjudication loop that folds answers back into the scope. And breaks an approved scope into an implementation-ready feature breakdown — a folder per feature (business context, implementation plan, workflow, acceptance criteria, dependencies, open questions, status) plus a feature index under context/features/, marking assumptions and open questions instead of inventing requirements. Provides /ba:scope, /ba:review, /ba:resolve, and /ba:features.
